description: Carry the reviewed code-mode workflow runtime guidance into the repository and preserve host Codex availability inside the Nix development shell without recursively preferring Nix-packaged Codex binaries. Acceptance: the runtime notes clearly remain implementation guidance, flake evaluation/checks pass, the shell PATH logic is syntax-safe, only flake.nix and docs/code-mode-workflow-runtime-notes.md change, and the work lands through a focused PR.
title: Document code-mode runtime and stabilize Codex shell PATH
